hero.heading:

experiences with
intention.
hero.sub_heading: I design and build thoughtful products that prioritize clarity, usability, and meaningful interactions.

about.about_content: I am deeply passionate about solving global challenges through impactful technology solutions. I build with intention, purpose and passion. I build to solve, improve and elevate.

projects.title: Taimako.AI
projects.description: Taimako is a modern SaaS platform designed to empower businesses with AI-driven customer experience and lead generation tools. It provides an intelligent, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) chat widget that can be easily embedded into any website, allowing businesses to automate customer support and engagement using their own knowledge base.

projects.title: Car Booking API
projects.description: Developed a high-performance vehicle reservation system with real-time availability tracking, secure payment processing, and driver management features.

projects.title: Chat Based Order Management API
projects.description: Innovative platform that enables businesses to process customer orders directly through chat interfaces, featuring natural language processing.

projects.title: NaijaFarmHand - AI Agent
projects.description: An intelligent assistant built with Google's ADK that provides contextual farming guidance for Nigerian agriculture.

writings.title: Learn Google ADK: Build a farming agent
writings.description: A comprehensive guide to building AI assistants using Google's Agent Development Kit, with step-by-step instructions.

writings.title: Performance Testing: Is Your API Ready?
writings.description: An in-depth exploration of API performance testing methodologies, covering load testing, stress testing, and scalability benchmarking.

writings.title: Understanding Row-level locking
writings.description: A technical deep dive into database concurrency control through row-level locking. Essential for backend developers.

experience.description: Built an AI Agent that supported the customer experience team and increased ticket resolution rate by 40%, while optimizing database queries and streamlining new staff onboarding. These improvements significantly enhanced team efficiency, reduced response times, and accelerated staff productivity.

Designed an efficient onboarding system that boosted client efficiency by 75%, along with a secure payment flow and smart booking logic that increased reservations by 30%. These improvements significantly enhanced user experience, operational speed, and revenue generation.

Engineered AI agents for marketing and research, built secure RESTful services for fintech applications, and mentored junior developers to boost their efficiency by 60%. These efforts enhanced team productivity, delivered intelligent automation tools, and strengthened core fintech infrastructure.

Implemented a secure KYC service for compliant customer onboarding, a high-performance booking system with 42% faster response times, and a robust media upload service for handling large-scale files. These enhancements improved user satisfaction, data security, and overall system reliability.
